hero.headline: Le Hoang Thien — Product-Focused Engineer Designing Reliable Systems at Scale
hero.subheadline: I combine product thinking with engineering rigor to turn ideas into reliable, scalable products.
hero.microcopy: Resume (PDF) — Full summary of experience, technologies, and project outcomes.

image.alt: Portrait of Le Hoang Thien — Product-Focused Engineer

about.short_blurb: Le Hoang Thien — Product-focused engineer. I design and build impactful products with reliable, scalable architectures.
extended_story: I blend product thinking with engineering skills to turn ideas into practical solutions. My role is to define architecture and technical decisions that keep products stable and scalable.

My approach is iterative and data-informed: I start with discovery, validate hypotheses quickly, then design systems aligned with product goals. I prioritize clear trade-offs—reducing complexity where appropriate and investing in reliability where it matters most.

I have contributed to projects such as myU, MyU ID, Events Platform, and Hung Hau House—covering product discovery, backend architecture, authentication integration, and end-to-end feature delivery. Each project sharpened my ability to choose technical trade-offs that drive product outcomes.

Currently, I am expanding my expertise in system architecture, observability, and operational reliability. I focus on measuring product success through data and ensuring systems deliver on those commitments.
engineering_journey: Lead product discovery and define success metrics for core features.
Design backend architecture and APIs for user-facing applications (e.g., myU).
Build authentication and identity solutions (MyU ID), including SSO integrations.
Architect event-driven platforms: contract design, data pipelines, and delivery models.
Deliver full-stack solutions for smaller projects (Hung Hau House), from UI/UX to backend.
Align engineering choices with product management to prioritize the roadmap by user impact.
Tech stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, TailwindCSS, cloud infrastructure.
Focus areas: observability, testing, performance, and maintainability.

timeline.title: Events Platform — Peak production usage
timeline.description: Dynamic form/survey platform used for large events. 48 events organized; 270,524 survey responses; peak 3,325 responses on 2026-01-24.

timeline.title: Events Platform — High-concurrency handling & FE features
timeline.description: Handled traffic spikes (up to 2,433 responses/hour, 103 responses/minute). Implemented dynamic form builder, Office365 SSO (MSAL), Excel export, and QR check-in.

timeline.title: myU — Orders & growth snapshot
timeline.description: Production e-commerce/ticketing site with measurable business impact: total orders and active users. Peak orders/day recorded.

timeline.title: MyU ID — Identity & SSO platform
timeline.description: Built OAuth2-based SSO, social login (Google/Facebook/Apple), OTP flows, device management, and structured logging.

timeline.title: Hung Hau House — Architecture & platform update
timeline.description: Next.js + API + data layer architecture with emphasis on SSR/CSR patterns, auth (MSAL), hydration handling, and performance improvements.

items.title: System Architecture & Scalability
items.description: Designing modular systems with clear boundaries, resilient APIs, and practical scaling strategies.

items.title: Observability & Reliability
items.description: Improving production visibility with structured logging, tracing, and actionable monitoring for faster incident response.

items.title: Performance Engineering
items.description: Profiling end-to-end latency, optimizing data access patterns, and reducing frontend/backend bottlenecks.

items.title: Secure Authentication & Identity
items.description: Deepening expertise in OAuth2/SSO flows, token lifecycle management, and secure session design.

items.title: Product Engineering Craft
items.description: Strengthening the bridge between product decisions and engineering trade-offs using measurable outcomes.
